APIService.description: APIService creation settings for prometheus adapter operator

affinity.description: If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.30/#affinity-v1-core

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

auth.description: Auth configuration for prometheus adapter operator

password.description: Secret name and key inside with the password for basic authentication to Prometheus

username.description: Secret name and key inside with the username for basic authentication to Prometheus

key.description: Key inside the secret with the username for basic authentication to Prometheus

name.description: Secret name with the username for basic authentication to Prometheus

username.description: Username for basic authentication to Prometheus to store in the secret that will be created

password.description: Password for basic authentication to Prometheus to store in the secret that will be created

basicAuth.description: Basic authentication configuration for connecting to Prometheus

configResourceMetrics.description: Config for resourceMetrics will be added in prometheus-adapter-resource-rules ConfigMap.

install.description: Allow to disable create Role during deploy

name.description: Name of the cluster role for prometheus-adapter-operator

install.description: Allow to disable create RoleBinding during deploy

name.description: Name of the cluster role binding for prometheus-adapter-operator

customScaleMetricRulesSelector.description: Label selector for CustomScaleMetricRule custom resources

image.description:
Prometheus adapter operator image to deploy.
Default: ghcr.io/netcracker/qubership-prometheus-adapter:main

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects

metricsRelistInterval.description: Interval at which to update the cache of available metrics from Prometheus

name.description: Provide a name in place of prometheus-adapter-operator for labels

nodeSelector.description: Allow define which Nodes the Pods are scheduled on

affinity.description: If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints for the operator

image.description:
Prometheus adapter operator image to deploy.
Default: ghcr.io/netcracker/qubership-prometheus-adapter-operator:main

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for the operator pods

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClassName assigned to the operator Pods to prevent them from evicting. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/pod-priority-preemption/#podpriorityclass

resources.description: The resources describes the compute resource requests and limits for operator pods. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/

limits.description: Limits describes the maximum amount of compute resources allowed.

requests.description: Requests describes the minimum amount of compute resources required.

securityContext.description: SecurityContext holds pod-level security attributes for the operator

runAsUser.description:
The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process. Defaults to user specified in image metadata if unspecified. The default value is set to "0",
 because otherwise the operator does not work correctly.

fsGroup.description: A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod.

createSecret.description:
Create secret with TLS certificates for prometheus adapter operator. Do not use createSecret if you use generateCerts
Will be ignored if existingSecret is already specified.

cert.description: Certificate in PEM format to store in the secret

key.description: Private key in PEM format to store in the secret

ca.description: CA certificate in PEM format to store in the secret

secretName.description: Secret name to store TLS certificates

existingSecret.description: TLS configuration from existing secret. If specified, all subsequent parameters in tls section are ignored.

clusterIssuerName.description: ClusterIssuer name to use for certificate generation

duration.description: Duration in days for generated certificates

renewBefore.description: Number of days before certificate expiry to renew

secretName.description: Secret name to store generated certificates

tlsConfig.description: TLS configuration for prometheus adapter operator

tlsEnabled.description: Enable TLS for prometheus adapter operator

tolerations.description: Tolerations allow the operator pods to schedule onto nodes with matching taints

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClassName assigned to the Pods to prevent them from evicting. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/pod-priority-preemption/#podpriorityclass

prometheusUrl.description: URL used to connect to Prometheus. May contains query parameters to configure the connection

replicas.description: Replicas set the expected replicas of the prometheus-adapter

resources.description: The resources describes the compute resource requests and limits for single Pods. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/

limits.description: Limits describes the maximum amount of compute resources allowed for a container. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/#resource-limits

requests.description: Requests describes the minimum amount of compute resources required for a container. If Requests is omitted for a container, it defaults to Limits if that is explicitly specified, otherwise to an implementation-defined value. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/#resource-requests-and-limits

runAsUser.description:
The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process. Defaults to user specified in image metadata if unspecified. The default value is set to "0",
 because otherwise the operator does not work correctly.

fsGroup.description: A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod.

tolerations.description: Tolerations allow the pods to schedule onto nodes with matching taints
